IS ASTROLOGY USEFUL TO HUMAN BEINGS?
Yes. It is useful for human beings in physiological, mental,
and all worldly affairs.
HOW IS IT USEFUL?
Mind, intellect and ego always prevail in all living beings.
The conjunction of planets, at the time of birth ascribes specific
characters to the native.
When a person goes for consultation, a learned astrologer,

4 FUNDAMENTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM OF NADI ASlROLOGY
can precisely deduce the reason which has made the native to go
in for consultation, the nature of the problem and the solution for
it, considering planetary positions at the time of consultation and
the conjunction of the planets Different natives come under
different emotional conditions and are of different temperaments.
